'''âw-y-ng-n''' ('''kawayngenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jaculate|jaculate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jaculate|jaculate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| kawayngenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayngenoko|thiwayngenoko]] || [[word:jiwayngenoko|jiwayngenoko]] || [[word:shiwayngenoko|shiwayngenoko]] || [[word:kiwayngenoko|kiwayngenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayngenoko|thuthuwayngenoko]] || [[word:jujuwayngenoko|jujuwayngenoko]] || [[word:shushuwayngenoko|shushuwayngenoko]] || [[word:kukuwayngenoko|kukuwayngenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
